edgeCases: Empty targets list -> Skip with clear message (no false Pass, no panic)
Malformed target (blank/whitespace goos or goarch) dropped by NormalizeBuildGate; valid targets trimmed and preserved
CGO_ENABLED=0 always exported so cross-compile works without a C toolchain
Unknown/garbage target reported as a sorted goos/goarch Fail Detail, never a panic or stack trace
Command argv-parsed via strings.Fields + exec.Command (no sh -c); empty command yields descriptive error; broken-target simulated by explicit script file
stderr-empty failure (e.g. command not found) falls back to exec error string so Details are never empty
Target-list drift between centinela.toml and release.yml matrix caught at validate by TestBuildMatrixParity (verified: fails naming the missing target, passes when restored)
Build-cache warm reuse is a perf property of real go build (no -a, output discarded); not timed in the synthetic test suite
